allow: Bash(ssh -i '~/.ssh/ds' ds@192.168.1.231 'sudo su - jukebox -c '\\''podman exec jukebox-server ls -la /config/prefs/ 2>&1 | grep -iE "player|squeeze"'\\'':*)
